brief: At least 27 die in Bangkok bar fire; US and Iran trade strikes, oil surges; Senator Lindsey Graham dies; papers explore AI coding assistants and brain-computer interfaces.
news_summary: A fire at a Bangkok bar killed 27 and injured dozens; US-Iran hostilities escalated with strikes and rising oil prices; Senator Lindsey Graham died suddenly at 69; an Australian university tutor reported Nazi salutes from students.
papers_summary: Research on configurable AI coding assistants, mandatory wearable sensing in high-stakes contexts, and a landscape analysis of brain-computer interface trials in China highlight human-control and ethical challenges.

en.brief: At least 27 die in Bangkok bar fire; US and Iran trade strikes, oil surges; Senator Lindsey Graham dies; papers explore AI coding assistants and brain-computer interfaces.
en.news_summary: A fire at a Bangkok bar killed 27 and injured dozens; US-Iran hostilities escalated with strikes and rising oil prices; Senator Lindsey Graham died suddenly at 69; an Australian university tutor reported Nazi salutes from students.
en.papers_summary: Research on configurable AI coding assistants, mandatory wearable sensing in high-stakes contexts, and a landscape analysis of brain-computer interface trials in China highlight human-control and ethical challenges.

zh.brief: 今日頭條包括曼谷酒吧大火致27死、食腦變形蟲威脅、高溫對女性影響更大，以及颱風接連登陸中國東部導致近200萬人疏散。研究方面關注AI輔助編程、可穿戴傳感與視覺分析。
zh.news_summary: 曼谷酒吧大火造成至少27死60傷，消防員半小時內控制火勢但傷亡慘重。福氏耐格里原蟲可能全球蔓延，台灣曾現病例。高溫天氣下女性更難熬，專家呼籲加強保障。颱風巴威兩度登陸浙江，當地嚴密防災；一週內第二個颱風登陸，近200萬人疏散。
zh.papers_summary: 論文探討AI編程助手的可配置性、強制性可穿戴傳感的行為探測與適應、以及用對話式音頻表示讓非視覺用戶體驗迷因。另有視覺分析儀表板用於診斷缺失數據和比較插補方法。

todays_image.caption: The helmet number 7, once a proud emblem of firefighting heritage, now shadows the tragic multiple of 7 in Bangkok's deadly bar blaze.
todays_image.title: Helmet Frontpiece, “Shiffler S. Fire Co. 7”
